programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Grape 125
programme.desc: Grape 125

programme.title: Hong 102
programme.desc: Hong 102

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: 1997 Budweiser Cup

programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: 1990 Budweiser Thunderboat Regatta San Diego CA

programme.title: 20th century Headlinds
programme.desc: 20th century Headlinds

programme.title: The Underground War - Part 2
programme.desc: A two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
programme.desc:
Roy Rogers and George Gabby Hayes in Sheriff of Tombstone 1941
The mayor has sent for a gunslinger who though appearing to clean up the town is really to be the mayors means of taking the town over When Roy and Gabby arrive in Tombstone Roy is mistaken for the gunslinger Just as Roy is ready to expose the mayor the real gunslinger shows up

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious natureAt the end of an exhausting cattle drive Gene Autry Gene Autry and his faithful sidekick Frog Millhouse Smiley Burnette leave their herd at a train depot where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter Frances Grant and her engineer father George Sam Flint Impressed by their toughness the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Pit is heading for disappointment from his TV hero after he decides to aid him versus Mother Brain

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When a doctor experimenting in near death experiences dies Nick secretly agrees to go under in an attempt to reconcile his own past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two cousins Ryan Dallion and Micki Foster inherit an antiques shop from their uncle Together with his partner they must track down cursed objects that their devil-worshiping uncle had created The first object is a demonic killer doll

programme.title: Night of the Demons
programme.desc: Night of the Demons is a 1988 American supernatural horror film directed by Kevin S Tenney written and produced by Joe Augustyn and starring Amelia Kinkade Cathy Podewell Linnea Quigley Hal Havins and Alvin Alexis

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: When a lecherous psychiatrist hypnotizes a female patient and seduces her hes caught by a colleague so he resorts to drastic measures to cover up his crime Meanwhile a man who has accidentally murdered is coerced by his girlfriend into undergoing plastic surgery to change his appearance -- but they unknowingly choose the face of a mobster who recently turned states evidence and is being pursued by a hit man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Amateur ventriloquist Billy Goldman learns that being a ventriloquist might not be the best career for him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A figure from Nicks past complicates a murder investigation forcing him to choose between reconciling his past and preventing yet another murder

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is stymied over how to rescue a captured member of the underground until a potential diversion appears in the form of an old WWI buddy of Sgt Schultz

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton begins to regret having so harshly punished the 73 Crew when McHale and The Boys - While in the process of trying to rid their island of a bothersome bird - Give The Captain the impression that they are out to get even

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton accuses Parker of cowardice after Parker loses his cool during the pursuit of a Japanese patrol boat But Parker redeems himself when - After a little pep-talk from McHale - He orchestrates the destruction of a German U-Boat on a mission to rendezvous with a Japanese patrol

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: The Colonels daughter visits from her all-girls school and the Colonel asks Sgt Carter to find her an escort so of course Gomer Pyle is the perfect choice - at least until her overly protective mother panics

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carters platoon takes part in war games and Gomers naive ways cause more problems than Sgt Carter can handle Will Gomers actions get Carter the boot

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E36
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E36

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E38
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E38

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While trapped in a television station in a seemingly impossible situation Max admits that he would like to have spent the rest of his life with the smitten 99 which she takes as a proposal

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While visiting 99s mother who also doesnt seem to have a name they run into Siegfried who is destroying Americas potato crop Max goes after him in a parody of Snoopy and the Red Baron

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Cindy and Stacks go undercover at a gymnasium linked to a series of baffling burglaries most recently one that netted a 400000 painting entrusted to Bear Enterprises Detective Finger a cross between Columbo and Clouseau joins BJ in cracking the case

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: The Retrievers-1
programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.title: Brotherhood of Justice
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves Kiefer Sutherland and Billy Zane star as high-school students who start a vigilante group to combat crime in their neighborhood

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: Bullwinkle 529
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 529

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw steals the big red ruby of India to use in his superlaser to destroy US communications satellites

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadgets assignment here is to protect a star musician Rick Rocker However Rick is startled by Gadgets appearance and is trying to avoid him But Dr Claw is planning to make some kind of mind-control record he wants to use Rick rocker So Gadget must protect Rick Rocker from Dr Claw and stop Claws production of the mind-control record

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The ANA negotiate amnesty for all resistance members Liam tries to convince resistance member Halley Simmons to take the offer Sandoval uses parasites to make volunteers do suicide missions against the resistance

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A young Morthren rebels against his people so runs away to live amongst humans and ends up becoming friends with Debi

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A diplomats slip lands Kimble in the only place he cant be re-captured a Washington DC embassy Dr Kimble ministers to the ambassador from a newly democratized African nation when the emissary is almost flattened by a DC cab Everything looks cozy for the fugitive whos in town to court an appeal specialist - especially bunking down the hall from the legations man-eater secretary

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble and a beautiful trucking dispatcher fall in love but shes afraid to tell him about legal restrictions against her

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is driving a herd of horses across land he thought was open range The owner Martin Storm roughs him up and steals them He gets help from a local rancher who has been trying to rid the valley of this menace since he got there

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The wife of a prison inmate is shot and killed in a laundromat in what looks like a professional hit Stone and Keller determine that it was the work of a prison gang that is using outside enforcers to force inmates wives to help them smuggle drugs into the prison Another wife of a prisoner is now targeted to be made to do what the murdered woman would not

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Xavier Sedras v. Jefferson George

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Sean McKinnon v. Preston Baptisten

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Jerad Meyer v. Zach Snyder.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tiffany Cass v. Janice MacAulay

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Get inside the head of Mac Laursen during his title fight against Bryce Gougeon. It was the biggest fight of his career so far...how did he handle the pressure?

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Cody Clarke

programme.desc: No description.

programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Chaleur Jones v. Kayla Matton.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Presto accidentally transports his friends to a faraway place where they face an enormous danger literally Now he must climb to the new heights of courage and master his magic to save the others

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids are adopted by a loving caravan leader who is searching for his daughter who was abducted by a demon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget must protect the Poot-Ta-Foots treasure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots

programme.desc: Neetra manages to get a message out regarding her planet Tekka Monster Minds are about to attack to acquire their powerful fuel miran to power his missiles The Vertim and Batim colonies rival each other for control of the pyramid made of miran
